message:
feat(runtime): system-wide backpressure propagation + queue depth instrumentation

Replace hardcoded-zero queue depths in HealthSnapshot with real-time
measurements using mpsc::Sender::capacity(). Add backpressure warnings
at 75% channel utilization for both capture and write queues.

- StorageHandle: write_queue_depth() and write_queue_capacity() via
  max_capacity - capacity pattern
- RuntimeHandle: capture_tx probe clone for capture queue depth,
  capture_queue_depth(), capture_queue_capacity(), write_queue_depth()
- update_health_snapshot: real depth values, backpressure warnings at
  BACKPRESSURE_WARN_RATIO (0.75), DB unwritable warning
- 10 new tests: queue depth lifecycle, capacity config, threshold logic,
  warning format, snapshot integration

wa-upg.12.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
